titleStmt.title: SII 17.453: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 453. (A.R. No. 422 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
This inscription begins with the praśasti Pūmēvi vaḷar, etc., of the king.

It records the conferment of Tiruppadiyakkāṇi and Śrī-Māhēśvara-kkaṅgāṇi in the temple of Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-Uḍaiyār, in Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu, a district of Dharaṇimuḻuduḍai-vaḷanāḍu by the Patipādamūlappaṭṭu-uḍaiya Pañchāchārigaḷ on Tiruch chiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ Nāgadēvan alias Tyāgasamudrappichchaṉ and his group. The dēvarkanmigaḷ of the temple were enjoined to supervise the singing of Tiruppadiyam and make sure that members partaking in the service were either related to or nominated by Tyāgasamudrappichchaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevivaḷar tiruppon mārvu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vicaiyamāmakaḷ velpuya
t tiruppa Icaiyin celvi Eṇṭicai viḷakka nirupar vantiṟaiñca niṇila maṭantai yait tirumaṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷar
tirumaṇimuṭi kavittenna maṇimuṭi cūṭa mallaiñālattup palluyiṟkkellām Ellaiyi liṉpam Icai
vinileyta ceṅkolocci vāḻiyūḻi yāḻi naṭappa cempoṉ virasiṅhāsaṉattu pu
vanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti kaḷ śrīkulo
ttuṅkacoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu tiripuvaṉacakkaravatti koneriṉmai koṇṭān
taraṇimuḻutuṭaivaḷaṉāṭṭuk kuṉṟūrnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyār koyilil pati pātamulap
paṭṭuṭaip pañcācārikaḷ tevakanmikaḷukkum Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyār koyilil tiruppatiyakkāṇi
yum śrī māyeśvarakk(ā)ṅkāṇiyum Iraṇṭāvatu mutal nam tiruppatiyam pāṭuvārkku nāyakam tirucci
ṟṟampalamuṭaiyān nākatevanāṉa tiyākacamuttirappiccaṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkattārkkuṅ kuṭut
tom Ikkoyil tiruppatiyakkāṇi Ivan kaikkoṇṭu Ivan Iṭṭāre tiruppatiyam pāṭavum pa
ṇṇi śrī mā[he*]śvarak kaṅkāṇiyum Ivan Uṟavu muṟaiyāre niṉṟu Aṉicantikka kkaṭava kaḷākavum
paṇṇi Ippaṭikku kallile Eḻuttum veṭṭavum rāyan Eḻuttu IraṇṭāvatuThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 17.453 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
